text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Yeah, that's right. That's right! There's
more than one race out there, and more than one
track to run on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I don't need to run for glory under a bunch of
pressure. There's a freer path as well.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Like...)

text_block_list.name: Freestyle Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Pal-mer! Pal-mer! Pal-mer! Pal-mer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Like where it all started—where I found my joy of
running!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's give it a shot!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Helios! Trainer! I think I wanna run in freestyle
races again!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
For real?! So you wanna kiss the Twinkle Series
goodbye?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Nah. I wanna run in both. I might have to choose
one eventually, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Is that okay with you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging from the look in her eyes, I can tell she's
serious. For the sake of her future, I approve her
request.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(It's been so long since I've run in a freestyle race!
The vibes here just hit different!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Everything is just fire! No chains, no
responsibility—just a place to get pumped up and
slay!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah! Time for takeoff! Let's gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Everyone's amped when they win and devastated
when they lose...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Waheeey! ☆ Great job, everyone! Now, let's sing
our hearts out!

text_block_list.name: Freestyle Racer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Time to party! No one's going home 'cause
they gotta train or anything like that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Now these are my people. Once the race is over, everyone's ready to cut loose.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (I've got everything I need here! Yeah!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: This is the best! I've got zero complaints!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (It's the best... Right?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One night, while walking around an empty
training area at Tracen Academy...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh... Hey, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Palmer? What are you doing here?
Palmer? What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Just doing some thinking.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: And looking past this fence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no need for her to explain any further.
Beyond the fence lies the familiar sight of the
track where she always runs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
On the other side of that fence lies a world that
doesn't mesh with me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The expectations out there weigh me down and
the pressure is ridiculous!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'd rather not go over there if I don't have to, and... well, I don't have to. I can just do whatever I want.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But... still... It's like...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: It feels like I'm missing something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I hate tough things, you know? Things'd be way
easier if I just avoided them and lived my life. But
despite that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Standing up to that enormous pressure somehow
even though you're, like, on the verge shattering
under its weight...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's like ohhhhh man! It feels sooo good, I just
can't get it out of my head.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Gyaaahhh! I'm such a dummy. I must be seriously
out of my mind if I can't even calculate these risks
and benefits right!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But, y'know... No matter how painful it is, no
matter how heavy the pressure, I wanna feel those
expectations...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
When I was a kid, it was a world I could never set
my sights on. Now I'm finally in a place where I
can stand side by side with McQueen and Ryan
and see everything firsthand...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And now that I'm here, I want people to be like,
"She's got this!" "She'll surprise us!" or "She's
gonna bring the vibes!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So I dunno what to do. Should I stick with
freestyle races? Or...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Or should I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There is a fence in front of Mejiro Palmer—one
she doesn't particularly need to go over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But in order for her to decide whether or not she
wants to climb over it, there's something she must
know.
choice_data_list: What kind of Umamusume do you want to be?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What... kind of Umamusume?
choice_data_list:
Yeah. What kind of Umamusume is Mejiro
Palmer?

Yeah. What kind of Umamusume is Mejiro
Palmer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Who is the real Mejiro Palmer that I want to be?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess I'm good with just being all right. I
don't need to be as good as Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'm more like some rando in the
background, anyway. Ahahaha...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (I'm not just some rando.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I just pretended I didn't believe in myself and ran
away.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(If I decide something's impossible, then
impossible it can stay.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: This is the best! I've got zero complaints! Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Freestyle races are the best. There's no doubt
about that. Everything about them is pure
freedom...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (But what I want is...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (The real freedom I want is...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: The freedom on the other side of the fence.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There're a lot of things that'll tie you down, and
the pressure is immense. And so are the
expectations! But even so!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I wanna be someone who's free within all of that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If someone looks down on me, or if I look down
on myself... I want to be someone who can brush
it right off, kick them to the curb, and tell myself
I'm the best!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I want the kind of freedom where nothing can tie
me down! That's...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: That's the Mejiro Palmer I wanna be!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says it with conviction. There's only one path,
one lane ahead of her. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Jump what? The fence?
choice_data_list:
Yeah, let's jump this fence and jump back into
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The world I used to be a part of is on the other
side of this fence. But even if I do jump over and
go back...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I won't be the same person I was before. I'll be the
me who chose to go back of her own free will...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Even though I was never any good and I tripped
on every hurdle life threw at me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'll be someone who chose to go back, despite all
that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer puts some distance between her
and the fence. And then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahhhhh! Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gets a running start and makes a huge leap!
The moon looks so big, framing her as she goes
over.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I... did it. Even though it was sooo high!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: And with a perfect landing, I might add!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Thanks! Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but it's kinda weird for you to welcome me
back like that. I mean, you're gonna follow me
wherever I go, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And it's not like I've come back to where you
were.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've come back to where I belong. I've finally
realized that this track is where I belong!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro Palmer comes back to the Twinkle
Series. We tell Daitaku Helios, and...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, seriously? It must be a bit painful, but I guess
you're back in the Twinkle Series then. I guess
that means—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That's right. It's best to experience both pain and
pleasure. I finally figured that out for myself.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
That's not what I was gonna say. What I'm trying
to say is...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: You're kind of a masochist, huh, Palmster?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: A masochist?! What do you mean by that?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: It's not like I like pain or anything!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Suuure you don't. ☆ I hit the nail on the head,
didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Urghhh... No. Well, maybe you're not totally
wrong... I guess...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer is a little flustered. All the same,
her deliberation has led her to clearing a major
hurdle in her life.
